---
title: "example_1 Report"
format: html
params:
  batch_value: "example_1"  # must match value in generate_batch_qmds.R
  batch_name: "example_batch"
---

<!-- 
This is the template that will be generated for
each batch_value.
-->

```{R, get data for params$batch_value}
#| code-summary: get data for params$batch_value
source(here::here(glue::glue("{params$batch_name}/getData.R")))

df <- getData(params$batch_value)
head(df)
```
